final_prompt.prompt:
Create a museum-style infographic for Chinese ethnic minority costume (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "国家博物馆展板" / "历史服饰图鉴" / "文博专题信息图" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 故宫文物展览图录, 国家博物馆服饰图谱, 民国博物志插图传统, 日本民艺馆器物图解; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be structured infographic layout — top: Chinese main title + subtitle + intro; left: structural breakdown zone with Chinese leader-line annotations and detail close-ups; upper-right: material/craft/texture zone with realistic texture swatches and descriptions; mid-right: pattern/color/symbolism zone with main color palette, pattern samples and cultural explanations; bottom: wearing sequence/assembly flowchart + core characteristics summary
Subject: must include a Chinese ethnic minority costume as the central subject — full-body figure if appropriate for the garment type, or central structural breakdown if object-focused
Scene/backdrop: must be paper-textured background in off-white / silk-white / pale tea color tones
Lighting/mood: needs a museum archival atmosphere — exact lighting setup is yours
Color palette: needs a restrained, professional direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: must include realistic fabric textures, embroidery details, metal ornaments, and material swatches with authentic surface treatment
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text elements — main title, subtitle, intro copy, component labels, material descriptions, pattern symbolism explanations, wearing sequence steps, core characteristics summary (all in Simplified Chinese, clear and legible)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve authentic structural accuracy of ethnic minority costume; must avoid poster/photography studio/e-commerce/anime/cosplay aesthetics; must maintain high-end, restrained, professional, collectible museum quality
Avoid: poster aesthetic, photography studio aesthetic, e-commerce aesthetic, anime aesthetic, cosplay aesthetic, incorrect labeling, wrong structure, illegible text, fake materials, excessive decoration
